title: CVE-2026-10591: Kiro IDE RCE
summary: [P1] Kiro IDE is vulnerable to remote code execution due to insufficient access control restrictions in the file write tool, allowing remote unauthenticated actors to execute arbitrary commands. No patch is currently available. Why now: Reported exploitation in the wild. (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: Kiro IDE is a framework-level vulnerability that allows remote code execution.

primary.title: CVE-2026-10591 - Kiro IDE Insufficient File Write Restrictions to Execution-Sensitive Paths

enrichment.lede: CVE-2026-10591 - Kiro IDE Insufficient File Write Restrictions to Execution-Sensitive Paths.

title: CVE-2026-10584: Graph Explorer HTTPS Fallback
summary: [P2] Graph Explorer is vulnerable to HTTPS fallback to HTTP, allowing sensitive information to be transmitted in cleartext. A patch is available in version 3.0.1. Why now: Reported exploitation in the wild. (confidence: 0.70)
classification_reasoning: Graph Explorer is an application-level vulnerability that allows sensitive information to be disclosed.

primary.title: CVE-2026-10584 - HTTPS Fallback to HTTP in Graph Explorer

enrichment.lede: CVE-2026-10584 - HTTPS Fallback to HTTP in Graph Explorer.
